_comment: Bundled offline OSV seed database. Read-only fallback so casket can resolve known-vulnerable fixture/common packages without a live OSV.dev call. Keyed by 'ecosystem|name|version'. This is a tiny curated set for v0.1, NOT a full vuln DB; live OSV.dev queries (cached to disk) cover everything else. Refresh from https://osv.dev as needed.

PyPI|requests|2.19.0.summary: Requests sends Authorization header on cross-origin redirect

Alpine|busybox|1.36.0-r0.summary: A use-after-free in BusyBox awk leads to denial of service and possibly code execution when processing a crafted awk pattern.

Debian|openssl|3.0.11-1~deb12u1.summary: Generating excessively long X9.42 DH keys or checking excessively long X9.42 DH keys or parameters may be very slow in OpenSSL.

Red Hat|openssl|1:3.0.7-6.el9.summary: A denial of service in OpenSSL related to the verification of X.509 certificate chains that include policy constraints, allowing attackers to exhaust system resources.
